details: The agent ran appropriate commands to dump the database schema, correctly parsed the CREATE TABLE statement for the posts table, and reported all 9 columns with accurate data types: id (bigint), author_id (bigint), title (text), slug (text), body (text), status (text), view_count (integer), published_at (timestamp with time zone), created_at (timestamp with time zone). All columns match the known facts with acceptable type naming.
